title: Greg's Best Swords
description: Hmm... Do you wanna my best swords?
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f3b3259fc475acaf2531e735d6e61945842674f.png)








## **Tired of giant swords that take up half your screen during combos?** This pack was created with a single goal: to clear your combat vision.

</details>



Focused 100% on optimized swords, it replaces the standard models with short, sharp versions, ideal for those seeking precision in PvP in 1.8.9 and newer.


<details>
<summary>But... What changes?</summary>

**What changes:**

_Short Swords:_ Reduced design that significantly increases your peripheral vision.

_Refined Pixel Art:_ Slightly darker edges for greater contrast against blocks and players.

_Vanilla Friendly:_ Maintains the original Minecraft colors (Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, and Diamond) to preserve the essence of the game.

_Zero FPS Impact:_ Because it's a pack focused only on items, it maintains your computer's maximum performance.


</details>


### Please subscribe in my channel! I will give you a cookie!
